author: NoiselessVolatileLobster
name: SpammerRole
short: Assigns a role to users with the Discord spammer public flag.
description: Automatically grants a specific role to users who have the public spammer flag triggered by Discord.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data about users.
install_msg: Thanks for installing SpammerRole! Use `[p]spammerroleset` to configure the cog.
